query: SELECT id, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created, status, classification, teamMemberId, tenantId FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 00:00:00' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
